message: 🌱 Add flux: GitLab bootstrap - git clone error: repository not found mission (#606)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flux-924-gitlab-bootstrap-git-clone-error-repository-not-found",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flux: GitLab bootstrap - git clone error: repository not found",
+    "description": "GitLab bootstrap - git clone error: repository not found. This issue affects 6+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify flux troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your flux deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for error: `failed to find group named 'company-de'`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux\n```\n### Describe the bug\n\nI am using a paid gitlab.com. The site reports this version: GitLab Enterprise Edition 13.9.0-pre 04013f0902b.\nI am using flux2 v0.8.0.\n\nI have a private group called 'company-de'. All subgroups are also private."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for GitLab bootstrap - git clone error: repository not found",
+        "description": "This pull request changes the implementation used to connect to Git\nproviders like GitHub from `fluxcd/pkg/git` to `fluxcd/go-git-providers`,\neliminating quite some bugs that were present in the GitLab integration.\n\nIn addition to this, the bootstrap logic has been factored out into an\n(for now)\n```yaml\n2)\nWhen I provide owner=project/ops i get the following:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm GitLab bootstrap - git clone error: repository is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that `failed to find group named 'company-de'` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This pull request changes the implementation used to connect to Git\nproviders like GitHub from `fluxcd/pkg/git` to `fluxcd/go-git-providers`,\neliminating quite some bugs that were present in the GitLab integration.\n\nIn addition to this, the bootstrap logic has been factored out into an\n(for now) internal package with two bootstrap \"runners\" `PlainGitBootstrapper`\nand `GitProviderBootstrapper`.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2)\nWhen I provide owner=project/ops i get the following:",
+        "I also tried --token-auth, --private, --path, --branch, --components but these params dont change anything.\n\n### Expected behavior\n\nI expect the bootstrap process to finish.\n\n### Additional context\n\nBelow please provide the output of the following commands:",
+        "2. Build the binary (requires Go 1.16 and Kustomize):"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flux",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flux"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",

+    },

+  },
